classroom.title: ACT I — Scene 1: Something in the Air
classroom.prompt: Manga panel. The protagonist sits at a school desk gripping the edge tightly. The classroom is normal but a heavy invisible pressure hangs in the air — shown as faint dark tendrils curling at the windows. Other students are oblivious. The protagonist sweats, eyes sharp and alert. High-contrast ink, screen tones. Add a speech bubble from the protagonist containing the EXACT text: "Something is watching this classroom."

smurfs_attack.title: And the Smurfs Attack
smurfs_attack.prompt: Manga panel, high contrast black and white. The protagonist is swarmed and overwhelmed by dozens of tiny blue-skinned creatures no taller than a hand, wearing white hats and pants, climbing all over them. The protagonist's face is pure horror. Add a speech bubble containing the EXACT text: "Get me out of here!"

falling.title: You're falling out the window, with no ground in sight!
falling.prompt: Manga panel, high contrast, black and white. the protagonist is falling from a window through a white void. The protagonist looks suprised and is saying these exact words: "What's going on...?" there is a very small smourf in the bottom left corner, winking and making a thumbs-up. Also, there's a small house floating in the void somewhere.

house.title: You enter the house floating in the void
house.prompt: Manga panel, high contrast, black and white. A friendly-looking old man opens the door of a small cottage floating in the void. He says, "can I help you?".

choices.label: Ask the old man about the void

old_man_1.title: The old man responds
old_man_1.prompt: A kindly old man sits on an armchair, drinking a cup of tea (inside the cup is a small smorf). He says this exact text: "I don't know why outside is only a void. Someone has been stealing reality, I think."

test.title: You say something.
test.prompt: The protagonist is confused because they just fell through a void and felt like something was watching their classroom. So, they stopped by a kindly old man's house to get help. However, instead of asking about the void or the class, they say something else in accordance with their programmed personality.

test2.title: The old man is confused.
test2.prompt: A kindly-looking old man sitting in an armchair in his house says: "What are you talking about?" He looks confused. The protagonist has a comically oversized sweat droplet on their head.

Watch_out!.title: You've been cornered!
Watch_out!.prompt: The protagonist, after just having broken into a house through the window, is now backed into a corner being threatened by the old lady, who's holding a knife. The old lady says, "Who do you think you are, breaking into our house!" The protagonist briefly responds according to their personality.

old_times2.title: But he's interrupted!
old_times2.prompt: The old man, sitting in an armchair and drinking tea, says: "well, you felt there was something wrong with the air in the classroom because--" However, his speech balloon is interrupted by the old lady, barging into the room, who says, "Who's this?!" The protagonist looks surprised.
